title: 🔷 Icosahedral Resonance
name: Icosahedral Resonance
what_it_is: Sacred geometry based on the icosahedron—used in virus shells, Buckminster structures, Platonic forms, sound harmonics.
how_to_use: her spine glows with icosahedral resonance—each vertebrae a harmonized facet
his halo is an icosahedral lattice—sound and light refract through sacred geometry
animation_behavior: Facets shimmer with vibration, rotational symmetry pulses, resonance responds to sound or presence ---
